title: Xi expresses ‘full confidence’ in China-Taiwan unity in meeting with opposition chief
description: Chinese President Xi Jinping reiterated his opposition to Taiwanese independence during a meeting with Cheng Li-wun, leader of Taiwan's pro-Beijing opposition Kuomintang (KMT) party. Her official trip to Beijing, the first such visit in a decade, sparked controversy in the self-ruled island that China claims as its territory.

title: Under the fog of ceasefire: Competing narratives over the peace talks
description: This week on FRANCE 24’s media show Scoop, we examine confusion over whether the US–Iran ceasefire includes Lebanon. The United States and Israel say it does not, while Iran and mediator Pakistan insist it does. Despite hopes for a lasting truce, the information war continues. Our guests this week are Joyce Karam, editor-in-chief of Al-Monitor, and Barry Malone, former Africa and Middle East correspondent for Reuters.

title: Céline Dion's concerts set to give Paris multimillion-euro boost
description: Céline Dion's 16 Paris tour dates could bring hundreds of millions of euros to the French capital this autumn experts have said, as fans flock from overseas for a rare chance to see the megastar perform live. Potential revenue from the series of concerts is expected to include ticket sales, hotel and restaurant bookings, retail spending.

title: ‘Neither war nor peace’: What Gaza looks like six months into ‘ceasefire’
description: Following October 2025 agreement, attacks continue, aid is insufficient and regional conflicts deepen instability.

title: Gaza father searches for his children’s remains in the rubble for years
description: A father in the Al Bureij camp in Gaza survived an Israeli airstrike but four of his children died.

title: Ukraine says Russia suffers record losses of soldiers
description: Russian casualties are mounting, recruitment is falling and territorial gains are dwindling.

title: Lebanon: Images of a Nation Uprooted by War
description: A million people in Lebanon have fled their homes as Israel clashes anew with Hezbollah. This is what their lives look now.

title: See You in Pyongyang: Russia Pushes Its People to Embrace North Korea
description: Through art, food, tourism and academics, an increasingly isolated Moscow is seeking to cement lasting ties with Pyongyang.

title: Iran War Live Updates: Vance Departs for Talks With Iran as Lebanon Impasse Threatens Cease-Fire
description: Vice President JD Vance expressed optimism before traveling to Pakistan, though Iran has threatened to boycott the talks if the truce is not extended to Lebanon.
